nodes.context: The most prominent criminal organization within Le Milieu, encompassing many criminal groups from the 1960s to the 1980s.
Marseille-based criminal group that manages modern criminal activity since the 1990s.

nodes.standard_name: Gang de la Brise de Mer
nodes.original_text_name: Gang de la Brise de Mer
nodes.context: Northern Corsica–based criminal group that manages modern criminal activity since the 1990s.
Corsican crime family based in Ajaccio, southern Corsica, defunct.
Corsican gang that penetrated territory previously occupied by the Brise de Mer Gang in 2010.
Marseille-based gang involved in a war with DZ Mafia in 2023.
Marseille-based gang involved in a war with Yoda in 2023.
Traveler family involved in robberies, extortion, drug trafficking, prostitution, and illegal slots machines in Camargue and Étang de Berre.
Jewish/pied noir clan that controlled prostitution in Paris and were considered Godfathers of Paris in the 1970s, later killed.
Defunct crime family, part of the Corsican mafia.
Gang that robbed nearly 30 banks from 1981 to 1986.
Gang that committed armed robbery, jewel theft, and extortion in the Paris area during the mid-1990s.
Corsican gang listed among French mobs.

edges.evidence_quote: modern (1990s–present) criminal activity is managed by the Marseille-based Unione Corse and Northern Corsica–based Gang de la Brise de Mer
edges.context: Unione Corse is a component of the Corsican mafia managing modern criminal activity.

edges.target: Gang de la Brise de Mer
edges.evidence_quote: modern (1990s–present) criminal activity is managed by the Marseille-based Unione Corse and Northern Corsica–based Gang de la Brise de Mer
edges.context: Gang de la Brise de Mer is a component of the Corsican mafia managing modern criminal activity.

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
edges.evidence_quote: In 2007, an internal conflict led to the deaths of 102 people on the island of Corsica fracturing the influence of the two larger groups in the island ( Brise de mer gang and Colonna family).
edges.context: The Brise de mer gang and Colonna family were involved in an internal conflict in 2007.

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
edges.evidence_quote: In 2010, The "Venzolasca Gang" penetrated large amounts of territory previously occupied by the Brise de Mer Gang.
edges.context: Venzolasca Gang took over territory from the Brise de Mer Gang in 2010.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2023, a war erupted in Marseille between the Yoda and DZ Mafia gangs left 49 people dead and more than 120 injured.
edges.context: Yoda and DZ Mafia were at war in Marseille in 2023.

edges.evidence_quote: Claude Genova's connections and infrastructure was overtaken by the Hornec brothers in 1994.
edges.context: The Hornec brothers took over Claude Genova's operations after his death; Genova had taken over from the Zemmour brothers.
